title: ferray-io: loadtxt/savetxt only work with Ix2 — no 1D text I/O
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

savetxt() requires Array<T, Ix2>. NumPy's savetxt accepts 1D arrays (written as a single column) and higher-dimensional arrays (flattened to 2D). loadtxt always returns a 2D array in ferray, even for single-row/single-column data. NumPy returns 1D for single-column data by default (ndmin=0). Add support for 1D input in savetxt and configurable output dimensionality in loadtxt.
